svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: One wave, all of it: 46 agents building in parallel inside the plan graph
svg.desc: Zoomed into a single wave of the plan graph. All 46 of the wave's agents are shown one-to-one as live nodes, fanning out from the plan above and converging on one integration branch below. Each node's outer ring colour is its model — Haiku, Sonnet, or Opus — and a brighter inner arc fills as that agent builds its task. Dozens run at the same time.
svg.text: INSIDE ONE WAVE · AGENTS AT WORK
